# CrossLoc3D: Aerial-Ground Cross-Source 3D Place Recognition

- **Work ID:** `LPR-003`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2303.17778`
- **Year / venue:** 2024 / ICCV
- **Relevance:** `core_lpr`
- **Representative tier:** `ordinary`
- **Links:** [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17778) · [Reviewed official code](https://github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d)

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** CS-Campus3D, Oxford RobotCar — `source_fact`; manual, p. 6–8, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
- **input_unit:** single 4096-point ground query scan or 100x100 m aerial point-cloud submap — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–7, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
- **invariances:** point-order permutation at global aggregation, cross-source viewpoint, density, coverage and noise gaps are learned robustness rather than rigid-transform invariance — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 3–7, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
- **representation:** multi-grained voxelizations, multi-scale sparse convolutions with feature selection, coarse-to-fine diffusion-inspired external-attention refinement, NetVLAD global descriptor, lazy triplet loss — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–6, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–10, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–10, § Abstract;III. CrossLoc3D;IV. Experiments, Fig. 2-8;Table I-V
